description: COALESCE preserves the SQL type of the first argument while adjusting nullability

columns.name: bio
columns.note: type is String from bio (text), non-nullable due to literal default

name: coalesce_preserves_type
query_sql:
-- @name GetUserBioOrDefault
-- @returns :one
SELECT COALESCE(bio, 'default') AS bio FROM users WHERE id = $1
schema_sql: CREATE TABLE users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, email TEXT NOT NULL, bio TEXT, age INTEGER, score NUMERIC, status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT now())
